message:
fix(reaper): restrict wisp reaper to ephemeral wisps only (ZFC violation bd-5frbt)

Remove stale_issue_age auto-close — issues should only be closed by
humans or agents with context, not by a heuristic timer. Restrict the
reaper to the wisps table only (ephemeral step tracking). Only close/delete
wisps whose parent molecule is already closed (proof the work completed).
Add dry-run mode via config for safe observability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
